name: com.polyphase.build.target.ps2
author: Justin Jaro
description: Adds a 'Sony PS2 (PS2SDK + gsKit)' build target to the Polyphase editor. Compiles via PS2SDK (mips64r5900el-ps2-elf-gcc), produces a bare ELF and optionally an mkisofs .iso for PCSX2 / FreeMcBoot. On Windows ps2dev ships a native build (https://github.com/ps2dev/ps2dev/releases); on Linux/macOS the toolchain runs natively against $PS2DEV. WSL routing is available as an opt-in fallback via the Target Options panel.
